QuestionSet.title: QuestionSet
QuestionSet.description: A set of parsed questions extracted from an uploaded PDF PYQ.

id.description: The unique ID of the question set.

userId.description: The firebase UID of the owner.

fileName.description: The original name of the PDF file.

exam.description: The exam name (e.g. JEE, NEET, UPSC).

year.description: The year of the exam paper or PYQ.

questionsCount.description: The number of questions in this set.

questions.description: The list of parsed MCQ questions.

MockTest.title: MockTest
MockTest.description: An individual mock test session created by a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the mock test.

userId.description: The firebase UID of the test taker.

title.description: Display name of the mock test.

questionSetIds.description: The IDs of the question sets from which questions were randomized.

questions.description: The actual questions included in this specific mock test.

numQuestions.description: Total number of questions in the mock.

markingScheme.description: Marking scheme like positive and negative marks.

answers.description: Selected answers mapping question index to choice index.

questionSets/{setId}.description: Collection storing parsed question lists for users.

mockTests/{mockId}.description: Collection storing mock test sessions and outcomes.
